title: Pronto Seed Tulip Tall Mix Bulbs | Set of 24 Tall Tulips Flowers in Pink & Red Shades for Spring Gardens | Hardy Perennials for Planting Now UK
features: CLASSIC SPRING ELEGANCE - Create a stunning display with this 24-piece mix of tall tulips, offering a beautiful collection of blooms in elegant shades of pink and red for a sophisticated spring garden.
IMPRESSIVE HEIGHTS - Specially selected tall varieties reach up to 50cm in height, making them perfect for creating striking visual accents in patio planters and layered garden borders.

YEAR AFTER YEAR BEAUTY - Plant these hardy, easy-to-grow perennials once, and they'll return each spring, filling your garden with delightful blooms that multiply over time for an even bigger display.

PERFECT FOR BORDERS & POTS - Ideal for planting outdoors in beds, borders, or large containers where they will perform best, these versatile bulbs are a garden favourite for their reliable and beautiful show.
QUALITY YOU CAN TRUST - Dutch-grown, top-grade bulbs for planting now in the UK. Easy to grow, reliable, and designed to return each spring with lasting seasonal charm.
